name: Selenium
summary: No consistent benefit in cancer prevention; essential for deficiency.
description: Selenium is an essential micronutrient for selenoprotein function; cancer prevention benefits are inconsistent and mainly matter in deficiency contexts.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Selenium may lower thyroid antibodies in some studies, but routine high-dose use should be avoided.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Selenium may lower thyroid antibodies in some studies, but routine high-dose use should be avoided.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Adult RDA 55 mcg/day; adult UL 400 mcg/day; many thyroid studies use 200 mcg/day
